title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates:
Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates!
